## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Type

- [ ] New incident(s) added to a corpus
- [ ] Tag / lesson / link correction
- [ ] New or updated skill workflow
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Docs / tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] JSON parses and both corpora load (`pm.py stats`, `ai.py classes`)
- [ ] Any new incident uses the controlled tag vocabulary and links a real source
- [ ] Lessons are a single transferable sentence, not a summary
- [ ] No em dashes (CI enforces this)
- [ ] I agree to license this contribution under Apache-2.0
